about.title: The firm that makes your wealth float
about.sub: Real estate investment in adjudicated assets and rights assignments, with legal and tax shielding built into every operation.
about.s1_p1: Altiora was born from a conviction: in Mexico, the best real estate opportunities — adjudicated assets and rights assignments — were reserved for a handful of specialists able to navigate their legal complexity. We built the infrastructure to open them to demanding investors, with the full legal and tax team included in every operation.
about.s1_p2: We like to describe ourselves as a vineyard in a valley flanked by mountains: perfectly ordered rows — the method and order of every file — protected by a mountain range that nothing moves: legal certainty. The land is the wealth; patience and technique, our way of cultivating it.
about.p1_d: As in a skeleton watch, every gear — legal, tax, real estate — moves exactly on time. A missed deadline stops the whole system; that's why here they are never missed.
about.p2_d: We treat wealth like Nero Marquina marble: dense, solid, nearly indestructible. Every operation is protected and compliant before moving forward.
about.p3_d: Our watch face is transparent: the client sees the whole mechanism. There is nothing to hide — not from the tax authority, not from you.
about.p4_d: We acquire → We shield → We monetize. Each area drives the next; the flywheel spins and your investment floats above the conflict.
about.p5_d: Tax reforms, court criteria, the market: we study obsessively to anticipate, not to react.
about.mision: To turn legal complexity into wealth certainty: detecting assets below market value and delivering them shielded, ready to generate appreciation.
about.vision: To be Mexico's most trusted real estate investment platform: every operation travels with the smoothness of a high-speed train — there may be a storm outside; inside, the water in the glass doesn't move.
about.manifiesto: “We are not a firm that moves slowly down the usual roads. We are the high-speed infrastructure that makes your wealth float above legal and tax complexity.”
about.proverbio: “He who wants to harvest well must sow with precision and wait with wisdom.”
about.proverbio_src: Korean proverb — it guides our process: sow with precision (millimetric contracts and strategy), wait with wisdom (appreciation matures with patience), harvest well (protected wealth).
about.s4_p1: Headquartered in Mexico City, operating in 18 states (demonstration figure). Wherever there is a court, a notary or an opportunity, we arrive with the same standard of rigor.
about.s5_p1: Every recovered and regularized asset returns legal certainty to a community: land back in the formal market, homes that regain value and neighborhoods with less abandonment. Investing with order is also a form of social responsibility.
about.e1: Strict legality: no operation moves forward outside the legal framework.
about.e2: Truthful information for investors: every opportunity is presented with its risks. No return is ever guaranteed.
about.e3: Absolute confidentiality of data and files.
about.e4: Zero conflicts of interest: if any exist, they are disclosed and the operation stops.
about.e5: Dignified treatment of occupants and counterparties in every process.
about.e6: Ethics and whistleblowing channel: etica@altiora.mx — every report is investigated.

services.title: All the shielding, inside the same operation
services.sub: We don't sell procedures separately: every investment includes the full legal and tax team, from spotting the opportunity to delivering the asset.
services.s1_p1: We support both investment routes — adjudicated assets and rights assignments — with one standard: the property is the opportunity; the shielding is what makes it safe.
services.b1: Judicial and registry due diligence of the file before investing.
services.b2: Procedural strategy in rights assignments: following the lawsuit through auction and adjudication.
services.b3: Deed transfer and regularization of the asset in the investor's name.
services.b4: Tax planning of the operation: acquisition, sale and holding taxes, no surprises.
services.b5: Defense against contingencies: occupants, defects, third-party claims.
services.s2_p1: Every file goes through double review — legal and accounting — and is documented end to end in the digital Vault. We work under written, auditable processes; ISO 9001 certification in adoption (demonstration note).
services.s3_p1: Trust is built file by file: the team's combined track record exceeds 25 years in litigation, accounting and real estate investment, with more than 1,200 properties placed and 100% of operations accompanied by legal services (demonstration figures).
services.s4_p1: Technology is part of the shielding. The Órbita portal gives you 24/7 access to your investment:
services.t1: Living catalog: properties publish from the database in real time.
services.t2: Vault: each asset's documentation, available only with authenticated access.
services.t3: Compass: a direct channel with your legal and tax advisor.
services.t4: Security: encryption, role-based access and an audit trail of every movement.

access.intro: At Altiora we are committed to the highest service standards. Signing in gives you full control over your investment.
access.channels: Our communication channels are at your disposal.
access.no_register: Accounts are created by your Altiora advisor.
access.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
access.tfa_hint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

portal.hello_agent: Feed and manage Altiora's property database.
portal.hello_investor: Check your balances, documents and talk to your advisor.
portal.hello_admin: Manage portal users and oversee the operation.
portal.add_sub: These fields feed the public catalog once published.
portal.l_precio_consultar: Show "Price on request" instead of the amount
portal.bov_s: Documentation per property. Authenticated access only.
portal.bru_s: Direct channel with the legal and tax team.
portal.bru_empty: Start the conversation with your advisor.
portal.st_s: Movements and balances of your investment.
portal.adm_s: Only the administrator creates accounts. No public sign-up.
portal.seg_s: Two-step verification (2FA) with an authenticator app
portal.seg_intro_off: Protect your account with a second step: besides your password, a 6-digit code from an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password…) will be required.
portal.seg_intro_on: Your account asks for an authenticator code on every sign-in.
portal.seg_scan: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
portal.seg_backup_s: Store them somewhere safe (not on this device). Each one works only once if you lose access to your app.
portal.seg_err: Could not complete. Check the password or code and try again.
portal.hello_legal: Court case tracking and contract generation.
portal.ex_s: Procedural tracking: status, search orders and letters rogatory
portal.ex_bit_ph: Record an action, ruling or note…
portal.co_s: Generate contracts from a template and browse history
portal.co_form_s: Fill only the variable fields; the template does the rest. Outputs editable Word and PDF.
portal.co_l_inmueble: Property identification (as it will appear in the agreement)
portal.co_ok: Agreement generated. Download here and in the Vault:
portal.co_sin_plantilla: Template not found on server. Upload arrendamiento-v1.docx to templates/.
portal.adm_delete_confirm:
Permanently delete the account {email}?

This cannot be undone. If the account has statements or messages, the system will protect it and refuse to delete.
